meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (polygon)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0x4AeA3A398Db41b45e146c08131aD27c75b02EC2F accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0x27635d8b4664Adf896Cd7a0E9E54b52138cb7cdC on polygon. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
